name: @nebutra/execution-policy
description: Shared command permission and approval policy primitives for runtime and execution packages

requires: @nebutra/agent-runtime consumes this contract for runtime approval grammar
@nebutra/code-execution consumes this contract for executor policy checks
gaps: Session-scoped approval persistence still lives in agent-runtime
Shell parsing remains prefix-based until a shell AST parser is introduced
Network and file-write policies are not unified here yet
nebutra.summary: Single shared owner for command permission matching and shell approval defaults
